evidence.snippet: At EUMOTORS, we design and manufacture advanced BLDC motors. Based in Poland, our mission is to make high-performance propulsion accessible, scalable, and dependable – even in the most demanding operational conditions.

items.notes: BLDC motors for UAS/drone propulsion — EUM-BLDC and EUM-XA series

evidence.snippet: The administrator of personal data is EUMOTORS sp. z o.o., with its registered office at ul. Dworska 1A / 2, 30-314 Kraków, Poland, entered into the National Court Register under KRS number 0001147077, NIP: 6762684170, hereinafter referred to as the Administrator.

EUMOTORS sp. z o.o.
Kraków, Polska

At EUMOTORS, we design and manufacture advanced BLDC motors. Based in Poland, our mission is to make high-performance propulsion accessible, scalable, and dependable – even in the most demanding operational conditions.
By combining engineering depth with production flexibility, we help system integrators move faster, operate safer, and perform where others can’t.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and manufactures BLDC motors sold to drone system integrators; no complete platform

evidence.snippet:
EUM-XA Series: Industrial Grade Heavy-Lift Propulsion
-----------------------------------------------------
Engineered for maximum endurance and reliability, the EUM-XA series delivers up to 128 kg of thrust per unit, providing professional-grade efficiency .
